title: Run native_sim-only ICMPv6 firmware
description: Coverage blocker discovered by project-LICHEN-m5m1.5. lichen/tests/icmpv6 permits only 32-bit native_sim, so it is not selected by ARM64 native_sim/native/64 or qemu_x86 integration runs. Provide an x86_64/multilib native_sim runner or expand the scenario to an independently valid backend, then capture runtime ztest proof.
acceptance_criteria: 1. ICMPv6 firmware executes on a declared valid runtime platform. 2. All ztests pass with provenance and logs. 3. Platform metadata accurately reflects supported backends. 4. No build-only result is counted as boot proof.
close_reason: Declared native_sim/native/64 support and captured passing x86_64 Native64 ICMPv6 runtime evidence; no build-only result counted.
